title: Blob-404 on Stop — revoked preview URL still fetched by DOM img
description: On Stop of a running generation, activeGenerations.end({revokePreview:true}) revokes the preview blob URL (URL.revokeObjectURL) while a DOM still references it — the gallery 'Generating...' placeholder tile and/or the CUE panel running-row thumbnail (latestPreviewUrl). The browser then refetches the revoked blob and logs `GET blob:http://127.0.0.1:3000/ net::ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND`. Cosmetic only (one failed image request, no functional impact). PRE-EXISTING — the revoke path in js/services/activeGenerations.js:103-108 is untouched by the MPI-208 queue refactor; surfaced during MPI-208 Phase-3 Stop testing (2026-07-07). Fix = revoke-AFTER-derender ordering: clear the src / rebuild the placeholder+queue-panel views BEFORE revoking, or revoke on a microtask after the store broadcast so no live DOM node still points at the blob. Touch points: js/services/activeGenerations.js (end/cancel), js/components/Compounds/MpiGalleryGrid/MpiGalleryGrid.js (setGenerating placeholder), js/services/generationService.js:178 (_queueSnapshotItem previewUrl), MpiQueuePanel running-row thumbnail. NOT in MPI-208 scope.
